name: btp-praas-website
description: Local tooling for BTP PraaS PHP website validation.

scripts.check:php: php -l public_html/index.php && php -l public_html/about.php && php -l public_html/services.php && php -l public_html/news.php && php -l public_html/contact.php && php -l public_html/privacy-policy.php && php -l public_html/legal-notice.php && php -l public_html/includes/site.php && php -l public_html/includes/header.php && php -l public_html/includes/navigation.php && php -l public_html/includes/footer.php
